content:
✅ Snake Game has been written to `root/snake-game.html`.

You can now open this file in your browser to play the game. The game includes:
- Snake movement with arrow keys or WASD
- Score tracking with high score saved locally
- Game over screen with restart functionality
- Visual enhancements like snake eyes and food styling

tool_calls.name: bash_command
